functions.title: Guide Book #41
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #41§r
§lGiant Moa§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Neutral
•§lMob type§r: Large bird, Animal.
•§lSpawns in§r: Forest, Jungle, Overgrown Jungle.
•§lHealth§r: 20 §o(Adult)§r | 30 §o(Tamed)§r

•§lWalk speed§r: 0.3
•§lBreathes in§r: Air
•§lTempted by§r: Berries, Berry Pies.
•§lHealed by§r: Berries, Berry Pies.
•§lBreeds with§r: Sweet Berry Pie
•§lEgg laying§r: 1 Moa Egg.
•§lAging by§r: Berries, Berry Pies.

•§lTamed by§r: Glow Berry Pie
•§lPossible drops§r: Raw Moa, Brown Feather, XP Orbs.
•§lAggressive toward§r: Endermite, Silverfish, Small arthropods.
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 2-4 §o(Adult)§r | 1 §o(Baby)§r
•They can sleep during

the night.
•Tamed Giant Moa can be ridden using a saddle.
•Tamed Giant Moa can be equipped with a chest, providing 16 inventory slots.
•They can slowly regenerate their health when they sit or sleep.
•Wild Giant Moa can pick up foods that

tempts them and eat it.
•Wild Giant Moa carrying food will temporarily stop being aggressive towards the mobs they are aggressive with.

§lDescription§r:
 
§‘The Giant Moa is a docile yet formidable bird, prized for its strength, speed, and surprising intelligence. Though peaceful, it won't hesitate to stomp out smaller pests like Silverfish or Endermites.
